implemented_rules.name: publication_role.delivered_report delivered inference
guards: object is source, event, claim, or entity
subject and object are not the same record
relation/evidence/endpoint text has no future, uncertain, former, or to_be/will_be token

implemented_rules.name: meeting agenda authorization request timeline inference
guards: citing source is meeting agenda, agenda items, staff summary, or staff summary packet
citing source is not a work plan
reject no-items, no-meeting, postponed, deferred, cancelled, withdrawn, denied, lack-of-quorum, and past-tense approval/adoption/execution wording

implemented_rules.name: future treatment evidence planned inference
guards: corridor or route subject and treatment_component object
lifecycle key uses relation, object, and evidence text only
matches explicit future treatment patterns for DOT offset bus lanes, bus lanes in effect, bus bulbs/sidewalks extending to bus lanes, or TSP extended green

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/records/assertion-qualifiers.test.ts passed: 53 tests, 275 expect calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize completed cleanly; Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired submissions skipped: 243; SQLite FTS quick_check: ok

intentionally_unresolved: metric_context.has_metric remains the largest residual bucket and needs a separate value/date semantics rule before bulk classification
work-plan No Items / No Meetings Held timeline rows remain unknown by design
generic treatment headings, map legends, ambiguous proposed/delivered treatment rows, and delivered Flatbush TSP evidence remain separate rules
identity-review duplicate project/route pressure remains at zero and was not reopened in this slice
next_lanes: consume the metric_context.has_metric scout when complete and implement only a provenance-safe metric rule
audit publication_role.published_by/prepared_by residuals for source-vs-entity endpoint contamination
continue small timeline/treatment status slices with exact text guards
